creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rm
Date: Fri Mar 25 19:01:01 UTC 2016
New revision: 411881
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/411881

Log:
  sysutils/ldap-account-manager update to 5.3

  This release adds PHP 7 compatibility and includes several enhancements for
  Windows, NIS and Puppet. LAM Pro supports LDAP views. Password notification
  jobs, custom fields and Zarafa support were extended.

  PR:		208187
  Submitted by:	basil@vpm.net.ua (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile
  head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/distinfo
